title: Terms and conditions
seoDescription: Multilingual terms and conditions template pending legal review.
intro: This template replaces the inherited terms and requires legal review before it can be considered final.

sections.heading: Scope of the website and information
body: Clarify whether the website only presents services or also includes contracting, booking or binding quotation flows.
Avoid automatically carrying over returns or sales conditions if they do not apply to the new version.

sections.heading: Contact and complaints
body: Use david@instalberrozpe.com as the confirmed contact channel unless legal review defines a different specific channel.
Review company and responsible-party details before final publication.

pendingReviewNote: Pending full legal review before publication.
